name: Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 cups instant mashed potatoes (made according to directions, but using about 1/4 cup less liquid than called for.)
1 teaspoon onion salt (can substitute seasoned salt and pepper)
recipeInstructions:
While the potatoes are still hot, add all other ingredients. Transfer to a baking dish.
Dot generously with butter. Sprinkle with paprika. Bake 30 minutes at 350 degrees.
FOR POTATO BALLS - Start with 1-inch cube of Velveeta Cheese. Cover with potato mixture, about the size of a baseball. Roll in crushed Corn Flakes or crushed Potato Chips. Heat in a 400° oven for about 20 minutes.
